DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-19-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Andrea Hicks, from Bryan Cave LLP, 415-675-3400, for defendants and moving party

No other Appearance. Tentative Ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., INDIVIDUALLY AND ASSUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO BAC HOME LOANS SERVICING, LP, AND MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
Demurrer to First Amended Complaint sustained without leave to amend. No opposition was filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla Miller, Court Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR #11918

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2011 Continued To Dec-30-11 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-19-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
DEFENDANT GREENPOINT MORTGAGE FUNDING INC.'s Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is overruled in its entirety. Plaintiff has pled sufficient facts to toll the statute of limitations under application of the discovery rule. Plaintiff has adequately pled all causes of action. Defendant raises several factual issues not appropriately decided on a demurrer. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-19-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Brandon M. Love, Esq., from Pite Duncan, LLP, 714-285-2636, for Defendant and moving party Old Republic Default Management Services, appearing by telephone

No other appearance, Tentative ruling is adopted.
Copies of the moving papers were provided to the court.
DEFENDANT OLD REPUBLIC DEFAULT MANAGEMENT SERVICE's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is sustained without leave to amend. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
